name: ai-requirements
description: PTO sync (Slack → Google Sheet) and email classifier (Gmail labels) for Claude Desktop.

plugins.name: pto-system
plugins.description: Sync PTO requests from Slack to Google Sheet, incrementally, with manager-approval detection in thread replies.

plugins.name: email-classify
plugins.description: Classify recent Gmail messages into business categories and apply AI/* labels via the Google Workspace MCP.
